name: Official Transcript Ordering Page
overview: Morgan's transcript page is the official starting point for ordering official transcripts through the Parchment workflow and for transcript-request help.

name: Registrar Service Request Forms
overview: The Registrar Service Request Forms page is the official starting point for withdrawal or cancellation requests enrollment and degree verification requests and other registrar service workflows.

name: Transfer Evaluation and Articulation Services
overview: Morgan's Transfer Evaluation and Articulation Services page is the official workflow entry point for transfer credit evaluation tools transfer inquiries and related appeal or review processes.

name: Office of Student Disability Support Services
owner_office: Office of Student Disability Support Services
overview: The SDSS page is the official starting point for accessibility services accommodation processes and related support procedures.

name: Forming a New Student Organization
overview: This page is the official starting point for students who want to create a new student organization and understand the approval timeline application process and required materials.

name: Office of Undergraduate Research
overview: The Office of Undergraduate Research page is the official starting point for students who want to begin undergraduate research or explore faculty-mentored research opportunities.

name: Handshake Career Platform
overview: Handshake is Morgan's official platform entry point for internships jobs employer connections and career opportunity searching.

name: Academic Support
overview: The Academic Support page is the official starting point for tutoring graduation support and broader student-success academic support services.
